Container.Name: plex-dupefinder
Container.Overview: Find and remove duplicate media files in your Plex libraries, scored by Sonarr/Radarr quality profiles.[br][br]Features:[br]- Scans Plex for duplicate episodes and movies[br]- Cross-references Sonarr/Radarr quality scoring[br]- Recommends which file to keep based on quality weight[br]- Delete inferior copies directly from the UI[br]- Shows reclaimable disk space[br][br]Configure Plex, Sonarr and Radarr connections in the Settings page after install.[br][br][b]Source:[/b] https://github.com/TehRobot-Assistant/plex-dupefinder
Container.Description: Find and remove duplicate media files using Plex detection and Sonarr/Radarr quality scoring.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Path for config files (API keys, settings)
